'''鈭歞h-l-r''' ('''kadhalar''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lyse|lyse]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-l-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lyse|lyse]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞h-l-r
|-
! Lemma
| kadhalar
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhalar|thidhalar]] || [[word:jidhalar|jidhalar]] || [[word:shidhalar|shidhalar]] || [[word:kidhalar|kidhalar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudhalar|thuthudhalar]] || [[word:jujudhalar|jujudhalar]] || [[word:shushudhalar|shushudhalar]] || [[word:kukudhalar|kukudhalar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudhalar|thudhalar]] || [[word:judhalar|judhalar]] || [[word:shudhalar|shudhalar]] || [[word:kudhalar|kudhalar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudhalar|thudhalar]] || [[word:judhalar|judhalar]] || [[word:shudhalar|shudhalar]] || [[word:kudhalar|kudhalar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedhalar|thedhalar]] || [[word:jedhalar|jedhalar]] || [[word:shedhalar|shedhalar]] || [[word:kedhalar|kedhalar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodhalar|thothodhalar]] || [[word:jojodhalar|jojodhalar]] || [[word:shoshodhalar|shoshodhalar]] || [[word:kokodhalar|kokodhalar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodhalar|thodhalar]] || [[word:jodhalar|jodhalar]] || [[word:shodhalar|shodhalar]] || [[word:kodhalar|kodhalar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodhalar|thodhalar]] || [[word:jodhalar|jodhalar]] || [[word:shodhalar|shodhalar]] || [[word:kodhalar|kodhalar]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhalar|dhalar]] || [[word:dhalar|dhalar]] || [[word:dhalar|dhalar]] || [[word:dhalar|dhalar]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhalar|dhalar]] || [[word:dhalar|dhalar]] || [[word:dhalar|dhalar]] || [[word:dhalar|dhalar]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhalar|dhalar]] || [[word:dhalar|dhalar]] || [[word:dhalar|dhalar]] || [[word:dhalar|dhalar]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhalar|dhalar]] || [[word:dhalar|dhalar]] || [[word:dhalar|dhalar]] || [[word:dhalar|dhalar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙dhalar|th忙dhalar]] || [[word:j忙dhalar|j忙dhalar]] || [[word:sh忙dhalar|sh忙dhalar]] || [[word:k忙dhalar|k忙dhalar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadhalar|thathadhalar]] || [[word:jajadhalar|jajadhalar]] || [[word:shashadhalar|shashadhalar]] || [[word:kakadhalar|kakadhalar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadhalar|thadhalar]] || [[word:jadhalar|jadhalar]] || [[word:shadhalar|shadhalar]] || [[word:kadhalar|kadhalar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadhalar|thadhalar]] || [[word:jadhalar|jadhalar]] || [[word:shadhalar|shadhalar]] || [[word:kadhalar|kadhalar]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadhalar|shadhalar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadhalar|goshadhalar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadhalar|gokishadhalar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadhalarn眉|shadhalarn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadhalarnkn眉|goshadhalarnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhalarn眉|gokishadhalarn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadhalarsh毛|shadhalarsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadhalarnksh毛|goshadhalarnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadhalarsh毛|gokishadhalarsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhalarro|shadhalarro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhalarnkro|goshadhalarnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhalarro|gokishadhalarro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhalarmu|shadhalarmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhalarnkmu|goshadhalarnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhalarmu|gokishadhalarmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadhalarsher|shadhalarsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadhalarnksher|goshadhalarnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadhalarsher|gokishadhalarsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadhalarng|shadhalarng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadhalarnkng|goshadhalarnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadhalarng|gokishadhalarng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadhalarya|shadhalarya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadhalarnkya|goshadhalarnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadhalarya|gokishadhalarya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadhalaryam|shadhalaryam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadhalarnkyam|goshadhalarnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadhalaryam|gokishadhalaryam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhalarn眉sh毛|shadhalarn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhalarnkn眉sh毛|goshadhalarnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhalarn眉sh毛|gokishadhalarn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhalarn眉ro|shadhalarn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhalarnkn眉ro|goshadhalarnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhalarn眉ro|gokishadhalarn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhalarn眉mu|shadhalarn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhalarnkn眉mu|goshadhalarnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhalarn眉mu|gokishadhalarn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhalarsh毛n眉|shadhalarsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhalarnksh毛n眉|goshadhalarnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhalarsh毛n眉|gokishadhalarsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhalarsh毛ro|shadhalarsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhalarnksh毛ro|goshadhalarnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhalarsh毛ro|gokishadhalarsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhalarsh毛mu|shadhalarsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhalarnksh毛mu|goshadhalarnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhalarsh毛mu|gokishadhalarsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhalarron眉|shadhalarron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhalarnkron眉|goshadhalarnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhalarron眉|gokishadhalarron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhalarrosh毛|shadhalarrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhalarnkrosh毛|goshadhalarnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhalarrosh毛|gokishadhalarrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhalarromu|shadhalarromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhalarnkromu|goshadhalarnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhalarromu|gokishadhalarromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhalarmun眉|shadhalarmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhalarnkmun眉|goshadhalarnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhalarmun眉|gokishadhalarmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhalarmush毛|shadhalarmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhalarnkmush毛|goshadhalarnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhalarmush毛|gokishadhalarmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhalarmuro|shadhalarmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhalarnkmuro|goshadhalarnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhalarmuro|gokishadhalarmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
